inline_comments.message: Why do we ignore these links ?

These anchors do not exist, they are ill-generated by sphinx from an objects.inv file.
This file is retrieved from an external project (mainly onap-integration).
We cannot fix them in the RST files here.
Though, the URL works so it is not really problem. Linkcheck reports a warning, not an error.

about:config is of course not reachable.

and according to
https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Tutorial%3A+Accessing+the+ONAP+Portal

portal.api.simpledemo.onap.org does not exist in DNS 
and should be filled in the system host file
